message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Provide "question" field with one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback: text that highlights problems with the text regarding the question. If no problems, highlight strong parts. "complies": boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text: "Šis pētījums ir nozīmīgs gam akadēmiskajā vidē gan arī praktiskajā tehnoloģiju attīstībā, jo decentralizēto finanšu sistēmu izaugsme prasa jaunas un efektīvas pieejas."

We need to answer:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list any sections. So fails. So feedback: text does not list sections. "complies": false.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So fails. Provide feedback.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So fails. Provide feedback.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly. Provide JSON array with 3 objects.

Ensure no extra whitespace or formatting. Provide exactly array. Use double quotes. Provide boolean values true/false. Provide feedback text. Provide question field as "Chapters", "Description", "Structure".

Let's craft.

Also the instructions: "Your answer must look like this:" with array. So produce exactly that.

Let's produce:

[
    {
        "question": "Chapters",
        "feedback": "The passage does not list any main sections or chapters of the thesis.",
        "complies": false
    },
    {
        "question": "Description",
        "feedback": "The passage does not describe the contents of any section; it only states the importance of the research.",
        "complies": false
    },
    {
        "question": "Structure",
        "feedback": "From this sentence, the overall structure of the thesis cannot be inferred.",
        "complies": false
    }
]

Return that.
